nasb.text: Then you said to your servants, ‘Bring him down to me that I may set my eyes on him.’

esv.text: Then you said to your servants, ‘Bring him down to me, that I may set my eyes on him.’

cnv.text: 你就對僕人們說：‘把他帶下來到我這裡，我要親眼看看他。’

ccb.text: 你吩咐仆人们把弟弟带来给你亲眼看看，

csbs.text: 你就对仆人们说：‘把他带下来到我这里，我要亲眼看看他。’
